controllerHost.description: ABB robot controller IP address or hostname (real mode)

defaultRobot.description: Default robot configuration ID to use

autoConnect.description: Automatically connect to controller on startup

rapidProgramPath.description: Path on controller to store generated RAPID programs

defaultMode.description: Default operation mode: virtual, real, or auto

wsBridgePort.description: WebSocket bridge port for virtual 3D viewer mode (default: 9877)
